full_text:
Wei Zi (Zixu) 衛茲 (子許)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Zi (衛茲), styledZixu (子許), was born in Chenliu. Constantly refused appointment till he met Cao Cao. Gave away property to help raise troops. Wei Zi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Zhang Miao. Wei Zi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
